title: Recruitment – Various Positions at IC IITP
summary: IC IITP invites applications for various administrative and technical positions. Deadline: 18 January 2026.
body:
The Incubation Centre, IIT Patna (IC IITP) invites applications from eligible candidates for various positions. The roles span administration, technical operations, incubation management, and programme coordination. Interested candidates should download the application form and submit it via email to iciitp@iitp.ac.in before the deadline.

For details on roles, qualifications, and remuneration, please refer to the official notification linked below or contact the office directly.
